segments.caption: The video opens with a black screen displaying the logo 'LUC & COOK BY YIANNIS LUCACOS' in white and red text. The scene transitions to a well-lit, modern kitchen where a man wearing a light blue shirt and a black apron with 'YL' embroidered in gold stands behind a wooden counter. He gestures animatedly while speaking, surrounded by shelves filled with jars, plants, and kitchenware. On the counter, there are fresh vegetables including red and green bell peppers, tomatoes, and zucchinis, along with bowls and a red enameled pot. The man begins cooking by adding olive oil to the pot, followed by chopped green herbs, which he stirs with a wooden spoon. A text overlay appears with 'ΔΕΙΤΕ ΤΗ ΣΥΝΤΑΓΗ www.yiannislucacos.gr' (See the recipe). The video then cuts to a close-up of the pot, showing the herbs sizzling in oil, before returning to the man who picks up a green bell pepper and a small onion, preparing to chop them. The video briefly shows a title card with 'ΓΕΜΙΣΤΑ' (Stuffed Vegetables) over images of the finished dish, featuring stuffed peppers, zucchinis, and eggplants, before returning to the man continuing his cooking demonstration. On-screen icons indicate the recipe serves 2 people, takes 90 minutes, and is vegetarian. The kitchen remains bright and organized throughout, with natural light and greenery enhancing the inviting atmosphere.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Man in Apron standing at the Kitchen Counter, actively engaged in preparing ingredients for a dish. He reaches for a zucchini from the Fresh Vegetables tray, which includes red and green bell peppers, tomatoes, and other produce. He places the zucchini on the wooden counter and begins slicing off its top with a knife, demonstrating a precise technique. A 'TIP' icon with a fork graphic appears on screen, emphasizing the instructional nature of the segment. He then uses a melon baller to hollow out the zucchini, carefully scooping out the seeds and inner flesh into a small bowl. The camera alternates between close-ups of his hands and wider shots showing his focused expression and the organized kitchen environment. The Shelves with Jars and Plants remain visible in the background, adding to the warm, natural aesthetic. The Red Enameled Pot is still on the cooktop, emitting steam, indicating ongoing cooking. The Man in Apron continues to work methodically, preparing the zucchini for stuffing, likely as part of the 'ΓΕΜΙΣΤΑ' recipe introduced earlier. The on-screen text overlay promoting the recipe website remains visible, reinforcing the educational and promotional intent of the video.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of the Man in Apron holding a green zucchini, beginning to prepare it by slicing off the ends with a knife. He then uses a Melon Baller to hollow out the center, carefully scooping out the seeds and flesh into a small bowl on the Kitchen Counter. The Red Enameled Pot, still steaming, sits on the induction cooktop, containing sautéed herbs and oil. As he works, the camera pulls back to reveal the full kitchen setting, showcasing the Shelves with Jars and Plants in the background, which are neatly arranged with glass jars, potted herbs, and kitchen decor. The Man in Apron continues to chop the hollowed-out zucchini flesh finely on the wooden counter, then adds it to the pot. He gestures toward the Fresh Vegetables on the white tray, which include red and green bell peppers, tomatoes, and additional zucchinis, indicating the next steps in the recipe. Throughout, the On-Screen Text Overlay in Greek promotes the recipe website, and the Recipe Icons remain visible, showing serving size, cooking time, and vegetarian status. A TIP Icon briefly appears, highlighting a cooking technique. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, with natural lighting enhancing the vibrant colors of the fresh produce and the rustic kitchen aesthetic.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a close-up of the Red Enameled Pot on an induction cooktop, where chopped green herbs and minced garlic are being sautéed. The Man in Apron, wearing his signature light blue shirt and black apron with 'YL' in gold embroidery, adds a generous amount of minced garlic to the pot, stirring it with a white spatula. Steam rises as he continues to cook, indicating the ingredients are heating up. He then adds a can of crushed tomatoes, which he pours in with a steady hand, followed by a splash of liquid—likely water or broth—from a glass measuring cup, creating a rich, bubbling sauce. The camera alternates between close-ups of the pot and wider shots of the Man in Apron stirring and monitoring the sauce, which thickens as it simmers. The Kitchen Counter remains cluttered with various bowls and utensils, including a tray of Fresh Vegetables like bell peppers and zucchinis, hinting at the next steps in the recipe. In the background, the Shelves with Jars and Plants remain visible, adding to the warm, natural aesthetic of the kitchen. The On-Screen Text Overlay in Greek ('ΔΕΙΤΕ ΤΗ ΣΥΝΤΑΓΗ www.yiannislucacos.gr') and the Recipe Icons (serving size, cooking time, vegetarian symbol) are consistently displayed, reinforcing the instructional nature of the video. The atmosphere is focused and methodical, with the Man in Apron demonstrating each step with precision and care.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of the Red Enameled Pot on the induction cooktop, where the Man in Apron is stirring a rich, simmering mixture of herbs, garlic, tomatoes, and liquid with a wooden spoon. Steam rises as he mixes, indicating the dish is actively cooking. He then steps back, places the lid on the pot, and turns his attention to the Kitchen Counter, where a white tray holds Fresh Vegetables—hollowed-out red and green bell peppers, zucchinis, and tomatoes. He begins preparing the vegetables, using a Melon Baller to scoop out the centers of the zucchinis, then arranges them neatly in the tray. He drizzles olive oil over the hollowed vegetables, adding moisture and flavor. Next, he moves to a glass bowl, where he whisks together a red sauce or marinade, likely for stuffing the vegetables. Throughout, the Shelves with Jars and Plants remain visible in the background, adding to the kitchen’s warm, organized aesthetic. On-screen, the On-Screen Text Overlay promotes the recipe website, and the Recipe Icons display serving size, cooking time, and vegetarian status. A TIP Icon briefly appears, suggesting a cooking technique. The scene is well-lit, with natural tones and a focus on the methodical, hands-on cooking process.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of the Man in Apron whisking a vibrant red sauce in a clear glass bowl on the Kitchen Counter, his movements precise and focused. The camera then pulls back to reveal the full kitchen setting, where the Man in Apron stands at the counter, surrounded by neatly arranged Fresh Vegetables on a white tray, including hollowed zucchinis, bell peppers, and tomatoes. He gestures toward the vegetables while speaking, then picks up a knife and begins finely chopping fresh green herbs on the wooden counter. After chopping, he adds the herbs to the Red Enameled Pot, which is simmering on the induction cooktop and filled with a rich, aromatic mixture of tomatoes, garlic, and herbs. He stirs the pot with a wooden spoon, then adds a spoonful of a white powdery ingredient, likely salt or flour, followed by a splash of liquid, possibly olive oil or broth. The steam rising from the pot indicates it is actively cooking. Throughout, the background features Shelves with Jars and Plants, adding to the warm, rustic ambiance. On-screen, the On-Screen Text Overlay in Greek promotes the recipe website, and the Recipe Icons remain visible, indicating serving size, cooking time, and vegetarian status. The TIP Icon briefly appears, suggesting a cooking tip related to the current step. The Man in Apron’s black apron with 'YL' in gold embroidery is clearly visible, and he wears a light blue shirt with rolled-up sleeves, a black watch on his left wrist, and a focused expression as he works. The lighting is bright and natural, highlighting the textures and colors of the ingredients and the kitchen’s organized aesthetic.

segments.caption: The Man in Apron stands at the Kitchen Counter, energetically gesturing as he speaks, with the Red Enameled Pot filled with a cooked grain and vegetable mixture in front of him. He then uses a spoon to scoop the filling from the pot and carefully stuffs hollowed-out zucchinis and bell peppers arranged on a white tray. The Fresh Vegetables, including red and green bell peppers and zucchinis, are neatly placed on the tray, some already filled. He uses a Melon Baller to hollow out a zucchini, then fills it with the mixture, repeating the process with a red bell pepper. The background features Shelves with Jars and Plants, adding to the kitchen’s warm, rustic aesthetic. The On-Screen Text Overlay in Greek promotes the recipe website, and the Recipe Icons remain visible, indicating serving size, cooking time, and vegetarian status. The TIP Icon appears briefly, suggesting a cooking tip related to the stuffing process. The Man in Apron’s movements are deliberate and focused, emphasizing the care taken in preparing the dish.

The lighting remains bright and even, highlighting the vibrant colors of the vegetables and the rich texture of the filling.

segments.caption: The video segment begins with a close-up of the Man in Apron pouring a rich red sauce from a Glass Bowl with Red Sauce over a tray of Fresh Vegetables, including bell peppers, zucchinis, and eggplants, arranged in a white baking dish on the Kitchen Counter. He then sprinkles a white granular substance from a Small Wooden Bowl with White Granular Substance over the vegetables, seasoning them thoroughly. Afterward, he covers the tray tightly with aluminum foil, ensuring it is sealed, and places it into a preheated oven. The scene transitions to the Man in Apron removing the tray from the oven after baking, revealing the vegetables now softened and glistening. He then places a white plate on the counter and begins to prepare for serving, using a spoon to scoop out the cooked filling from the Red Enameled Pot and stuffing it into the hollowed vegetables. Throughout, he gestures and speaks to the camera with enthusiasm, explaining the steps. The background remains consistent with Shelves with Jars and Plants, and the On-Screen Text Overlay and Recipe Icons remain visible, promoting the recipe website and providing cooking details. The TIP Icon briefly appears, highlighting a technique. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, with natural lighting enhancing the vibrant colors of the vegetables and the rustic kitchen setting.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with the Man in Apron, wearing a light blue shirt and a black apron with 'YL' in gold embroidery, actively preparing a dish in a well-lit, rustic kitchen. He begins by pouring a thick red sauce from a Glass Bowl with Red Sauce over a tray of Fresh Vegetables, which include red and green bell peppers, zucchinis, and eggplants. He then sprinkles a white granular substance from a Small Wooden Bowl with White Granular Substance over the vegetables, likely salt or cheese, as part of the final seasoning before baking. The Kitchen Counter is cluttered with various utensils, bowls, and ingredients, including a white tray holding the vegetables. The background features Shelves with Jars and Plants, adding to the kitchen’s natural and organized aesthetic. The Man in Apron gestures enthusiastically while speaking to the camera, occasionally pointing to the dish and the ingredients. On-screen, the On-Screen Text Overlay in Greek ('ΔΕΙΤΕ ΤΗ ΣΥΝΤΑΓΗ www.yiannislucacos.gr') remains visible, promoting the recipe website. The Title Card for 'ΓΕΜΙΣΤΑ' is displayed, indicating the dish being prepared is stuffed vegetables. The Recipe Icons (serving size, cooking time, vegetarian symbol) and the TIP Icon (fork and exclamation mark) are also visible, providing context and tips. The segment concludes with the Man in Apron placing the seasoned vegetables into a large red pot, likely for baking, while continuing to engage with the audience with expressive hand movements and facial expressions.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of golden-brown bread rolls and a plate of vibrant, glossy stuffed vegetables, including a green zucchini and a dark eggplant, glistening with sauce, set on a rustic wooden surface. The scene transitions to a man with a beard, wearing a light blue shirt and a black apron with 'YL' in gold embroidery, standing in a well-organized kitchen with open wooden shelves filled with jars and potted herbs in the background. He speaks directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures, introducing the dish. The camera then cuts to a title card displaying 'ΓΕΜΙΣΤΑ' (Stuffed Vegetables) over an image of the finished dish, with a small pot icon above the text, followed by a black screen with the channel logo 'LUC & COOK BY YIANNISLUCACOS' in white and red text. The overall atmosphere is warm and inviting, emphasizing fresh ingredients and home-style cooking.
